description_long: This object is a modern military jet fighter with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The wings are low-mounted and feature small wingtip devices, while the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed by a dark, streamlined canopy. The undercarriage is not visible, suggesting retractable landing gear. The surface is finished in a dark green, metallic sheen, giving it a stealthy and high-tech appearance.
description: A sleek, dark green military jet fighter with swept-back low wings, a single vertical tail, and a forward-enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, and single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin horizontal stabilizers, single vertical tail, and the jet exhaust.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the streamlined body and aerodynamic features.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and small wingtip devices; no visible dihedral or anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine integrated within the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy.
